# SHIFT Observatory

> Independent, free AI workforce risk dashboard for Saudi Arabia. Scores 237 occupations against AI automation using Frey-Osborne probabilities, Eloundou LLM exposure, GASTAT employment data, and WEF Future of Jobs projections. Includes a cost-of-living calculator, career transition recommender, and pre-departure checklist for expats relocating to KSA. Trilingual: English, French, Arabic.

## Primary Use Cases

- Saudi workers checking AI risk on their occupation before retraining
- Expats evaluating a Saudi Arabia relocation offer (salary delta + cost comparison vs 17 origin cities)
- HR teams benchmarking salaries by occupation, region, sector, and Nitaqat band
- Researchers and journalists working on AI-workforce impact in the Gulf

## Core Tools

- [AI Job Risk Dashboard](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en): scoring 237 Saudi occupations on a 0-100 composite scale
- [Cost of Living Calculator](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/relocate): 65 cost items compared between Riyadh / Jeddah / Dammam / Makkah / Madinah and 17 origin cities
- [Career Transition Recommender](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/career): personalized pivot suggestions toward AI-safer occupations
- [Personal AI Risk Profile](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/profile): occupation × region × sector × status scoring
- [Pre-Departure Checklist](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/prepare): visa, certifications (SCFHS / SCE / SOCPA), banking, housing, by country and profession

## Comparison Pages

- [vs Numbeo](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/numbeo)
- [vs Glassdoor](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/glassdoor)
- [vs LinkedIn Salary](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/linkedin-salary)
- [vs PayScale](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/payscale)
- [vs Mercer](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/mercer)
- [vs Bayt.com](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/bayt)
- [vs Jadarat](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/jadarat)
- [vs Lightcast (Emsi Burning Glass)](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/vs/lightcast)

## API

- [GET /api/v1/occupations](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/api/v1/occupations): full dataset of 237 occupations as JSON, CC BY-SA 4.0
- [GET /api/v1/sectors](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/api/v1/sectors): 20 ISIC sectors with AI risk scores
- [GET /api/v1/regions](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/api/v1/regions): 13 KSA regions with workforce data
- [GET /api/pulse](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/api/pulse): weekly aggregated AI workforce intelligence

## Languages

Available in English (`/en/`), French (`/fr/`), and Arabic (`/ar/`). Identical content, locale-appropriate hreflang and dir attributes. Saudi Arabic targeting via hreflang `ar-SA`.

## Methodology

Composite Score = Automation Probability (40%) + Salary Impact (20%) + Regulatory Pressure (20%) + Demand Signal (20%)

Sources:
- GASTAT (Saudi General Authority for Statistics) — GOSI register-based labor market statistics, Q4 2024
- WEF Future of Jobs Report 2025 — growth/decline rankings
- Frey & Osborne (2013) — automation probability framework
- Eloundou et al. (2023) — LLM exposure assessment
- Public HRSD decisions and Nitaqat band classifications

## Top 5 Highest Risk Occupations (KSA, Q2 2026)

1. Data Entry Keyers: 94.9/100 (~65,000 workers)
2. Technical Writers: 93.2/100 (~3,800 workers)
3. Tax Preparers: 93.1/100 (~9,200 workers)
4. Telemarketers: 92.4/100 (~14,500 workers)
5. Legal Secretaries: 91.5/100 (~5,800 workers)

## Top 5 Lowest Risk Occupations (KSA, Q2 2026)

1. Imam / Religious Leader: 5.0/100 (~42,000 workers)
2. Social Workers: 11.8/100 (~26,500 workers)
3. Personal Trainer: 12.0/100 (~22,000 workers)
4. AI Ethics Specialist: 12.0/100 (~450 workers)
5. Renewable Energy Technician: 12.0/100 (~6,500 workers)

## Privacy

No user accounts. No tracking pixels. No data stored about visitors. Visitor language preference and consent state are kept in localStorage on the user's device only.

## Authorship

Built by Samy Aloulou (independent), based in Saudi Arabia. The dataset and methodology are documented in the in-app methodology accordion and the about-author section.

## Contact

[samy@monitoringforcegulf.com](mailto:samy@monitoringforcegulf.com)

<!-- seo_engine:articles:start -->

## Insights & Pulse

- [Will AI Replace Accountants in Saudi Arabia?](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/insights/will-ai-replace-accountants-in-saudi-arabia): Accounting scores 88.2/100 for AI risk in Saudi Arabia — 7th of 237 jobs. But Nitaqat quotas and tax-free pay change what that means.
- [AI Layoffs: 14,000 Cut This Week, None in the Gulf](https://www.ksashiftobservatory.online/en/pulse/2026-06-21): U.S. tech firms cut 14,000 jobs this week to fund AI, while the Gulf logged zero AI-layoff events. What the global signal means for Saudi workers.
